title: pyrethrum leucanthemum
intro: Pyrethrum leucanthemum, also known as Chrysanthemum cinerariaefolium, is an annual or perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and bitter-tasting foliage. The medicinal properties of Pyrethrum leucanthemum lie in its pyrethrins, a group of natural insecticides that have been used for centuries to repel insects and other pests. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and colds, as well as its potential to act as a natural antiseptic and antiviral agent. Herbal preparations of Pyrethrum leucanthemum include tea, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
